name: nx
description: Fig completions for Nx by Nrwl

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run a target for a project. (e.g., `nx run myapp:serve:production`)

options.name: --allowedHosts
options.description: This option allows you to whitelist services that are allowed to access the dev server

options.name: --host
options.description: Host to listen on (default: localhost)

options.name: --liveReload
options.description: Whether to reload the page on change, using live-reload

name: --open
-o
options.description: Open the application in the browser

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to listen on (default: 4200)

options.name: --publicHost
options.description: Public URL where the application will be served

options.name: --ssl
options.description: Serve using HTTPS

options.name: --sslKey
options.description: SSL key to use for serving HTTPS

options.name: --sslCert
options.description: SSL certificate to use for serving HTTPS

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watches for changes and rebuilds application (default: true)

options.name: --buildTarget
options.description: Target which builds the application

options.name: --memoryLimit
options.description: Memory limit for type checking service process in MB

options.name: --maxWorkers
options.description: Number of workers to use for type checking

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Test an Nx app or lib

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: e2e
subcommands.description: Run e2e tests for an Nx app

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: lint
subcommands.description: Lint an Nx app or lib

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

options.name: --list-schematics
options.description: List the available workspace-schematics

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

options.name: --list-generators
options.description: List the available workspace-generators

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

options.name: --defaults
options.description: When true, disables interactive input prompts for options with a default {true|false}

options.name: --dryRun
options.description: When true, runs the generator without making actual changes {true|false}

options.name: --force
options.description: When true, forces overwriting of existing files {true|false}

options.name: --interactive
options.description: When false, disables interactive input prompts {true|false}

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

options.name: --exclude
options.description: List of projects delimited by commas to exclude from the dependency graph

options.name: --file
options.description: Output file (e.g. --file=output.json or --file=dep-graph.html)

options.name: --focus
options.description: Use to show the dependency graph for a particular project and every node that is either an ancestor or a descendant

options.name: --groupByFolder
options.description: Group projects by folder in dependency graph

options.name: --host
options.description: Bind the dep graph server to a specific ip address

options.name: --port
options.description: Bind the dep graph server to a specific port

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

options.name: --all
options.description: All projects

options.name: --base
options.description: Base of the current branch (usually master)

options.name: --configuration
options.description: This is the configuration to use when performing tasks on projects

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude certain projects from being processed

options.name: --files
options.description: Change the way Nx is calculating the affected command by providing directly changed files, list of files delimited by commas

options.name: --head
options.description: Latest commit of the current branch (usually HEAD)

options.name: --maxParallel
options.description: Max number of parallel processes. This flag is ignored if the parallel option is set to false. (default: 3)

options.name: --only-failed
options.description: Isolate projects which previously failed

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Parallelize the command (default: false)

options.name: --runner
options.description: This is the name of the tasks runner configured in nx.json

options.name: --skip-nx-cache
options.description: Rerun the tasks even when the results are available in the cache

options.name: --target
options.description: Task to run for affected projects

options.name: --uncommitted
options.description: Uncommitted changes

options.name: --untracked
options.description: Untracked changes

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print additional error stack trace on failure
